zh.lifeSummary: 當James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes於1414年1月出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes34歲，母親Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester15歲。他於1439年與Egidia Keith在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年9月30日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Forbes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Forbes in Tullynessle, Aberdeenshire, so named from Gaelic forba ‘field, district’ + the locative suffix -ais. The placename is pronounced in two syllables, with the stress on the second, and the surname until recently reflected this. Today, however, it is generally a monosyllable.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Firbhisigh ‘son of Fearbhisigh’, a personal name composed of elements meaning ‘man’ + ‘prosperity’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) in Connacht was famous for its traditional historians, compilers of the Book of Lecan.

variants.name: Fawbush
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which ispronounced as two syllables in Aberdeenshire. Compare   Forbush  .

variants.name: Forbus
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , reflecting thetraditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbush
meanings: Scottish: altered form of   Forbes  , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Altered form of German Vorbusch, a topographic name for someone living on the edge of a wood, from vor ‘in front of’ + North German Busch ‘wood, bush’.

variants.name: Furbush
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which is traditionally pronounced as two syllables. Compare   Furbish  .

variants.name: Forbis
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbess
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes was born in January 1414, in Scotland, his father, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, was 15. He married Egidia Keith in 1439, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 30 September 1460, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes est né en janvier 1414, à Écosse, son père, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Egidia Keith en 1439, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1460, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

ko.lifeSummary: James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes(이)가 1414년 1월 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1439년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Egidia Keith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 9월 30일 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-플로븐스 포캘키어에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes nasceu em janeiro de 1414, em Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Egidia Keith em 1439, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes родился январь 1414 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Egidia Keith в 1439 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 30 сентября 1460 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Egidia Keith en 1439, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
